mapper.select: SELECT ANSWER_NO, USER_ID, BOARD_NO, CREATED_DATE, CONTENT, UPDATED, DELETED FROM QUESTION_ANSWER WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION_ANSWER SET CONTENT = #{content} , UPDATED = 'EDITED' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
UPDATE QUESTION_ANSWER SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
